name: Employee offboarding credential risk check with RelayShield

parameters.content:
## Employee offboarding credential risk check with RelayShield

### How it works
Runs when your HR system POSTs to this workflow's webhook after an employee is offboarded. It checks the departing employee's email against three RelayShield signals — breach exposure, infostealer malware logs, and OAuth token exposure — and if any risk is found, alerts your security team in Slack, emails the employee's manager, and logs the result to Notion. Clean results are logged too, so every offboarding is auditable.

### Setup steps
- Point your HR system's offboarding webhook at this workflow's webhook URL, posting `{ email, name, department, manager_email }`
- Add your RelayShield API credentials to all three RelayShield nodes
- Set `notionOffboardingDbId` and `slackSecurityChannelId` in your n8n variables
- Connect and authorize the Gmail and Slack credentials

### Customization
Add more RelayShield checks (e.g. NHI exposure, identity graph) to broaden the risk signals, or adjust the alert routing to match your own security escalation process.

nodes.name: HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded
nodes.notes: Receives an HTTP POST from your HR system when an employee is offboarded. Expected payload: { "email": "employee@company.com", "name": "John Smith", "department": "Engineering", "manager_email": "manager@company.com" }

nodes.name: RelayShield - Breach Check
nodes.notes: Checks the departing employee's email for known credential breaches. A breach on an offboarded account that still has system access is an elevated risk.

nodes.name: RelayShield - Infostealer Check
nodes.notes: Checks whether the employee's credentials appear in infostealer malware logs — indicating their device may have exfiltrated corporate credentials before departure.

nodes.name: RelayShield - OAuth Watchlist
nodes.notes: Checks whether the employee's credentials appear in OAuth token exposure records — active tokens for Slack, GitHub, Google Workspace etc. that could persist after account deactivation.

nodes.name: Any Credential Risk Found?
nodes.notes: Triggers alert path if breach, infostealer activity, or OAuth token exposure is found on the departing employee.

nodes.name: Log Risk to Notion
nodes.notes: Creates a page in your offboarding risk log Notion database. Set notionOffboardingDbId in your n8n variables to your database ID.

parameters.title: ={{ $('HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded').item.json.name }} — Offboarding Risk Flag

nodes.name: Alert Security Team in Slack
nodes.notes: Posts a structured security alert to your security/IT Slack channel. Set slackSecurityChannelId in your n8n variables. Requires Slack Bot Token credentials.

textUi.text: 🚨 Offboarding Security Risk — {{ $('HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded').item.json.name }}

nodes.name: Email Manager
nodes.notes: Sends a summary email to the departing employee's manager with findings and recommended actions.

parameters.message:
=

Hi,

RelayShield has flagged a credential security risk during the offboarding of {{ $('HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded').item.json.name }} ({{ $('HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded').item.json.email }}).

CheckResult
Credential Breaches{{ $('RelayShield - Breach Check').item.json.breach_count }} breach(es) found
Infostealer Activity{{ $('RelayShield - Infostealer Check').item.json.found ? '⚠️ Device infection detected' : '✓ None detected' }}
OAuth Token Exposure{{ $('RelayShield - OAuth Watchlist').item.json.matched ? '⚠️ Active token exposure found' : '✓ None detected' }}

Please verify:

  • All system and application access has been revoked
  • Shared passwords or API keys the employee had access to have been rotated
  • Any OAuth connections to corporate tools (GitHub, Slack, Google) have been reviewed

Your IT security team has been notified. A log has been created in your offboarding risk tracker.

Powered by RelayShield — relayshield.net
parameters.subject: Action Required — Offboarding Security Risk for {{ $('HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded').item.json.name }}

nodes.name: Log Clean Result to Notion
nodes.notes: Logs a clean result to Notion so every offboarding is auditable, even when no risk is found.

parameters.title: ={{ $('HR Webhook — Employee Offboarded').item.json.name }} — Offboarding Complete (No Risk)
